Setlist
Shows With at Least One Officially-Released Song: 2000 - 2009
The shows on this list have had at least one song officially released.

Some shows have had multiple songs released on different compilations (e.g., 7.25.00's Satellite was released on the Warehouse 8 Vol. 5 compilation, while the Say Goodbye from the same show was released on the DMB Live 25 compilation). In cases such as this, we have listed one of the appearances in the "Release Name" column and any other releases with unique songs in the "Additional Release(s)" column.

1991â1999
2000â2009
2010â2019
2020âpresent
